---
title: "solutions"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
raw <- read.csv("data/GDP.csv", skip = 4, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
```

```{r}
data <- raw %>% select(-X.2, -X.5)
```

```{r}
names(data) <- c("CountryCode", "Rank", "Country", "GDP")
```

```{r}
data <- data %>% filter(!is.na(suppressWarnings(as.integer(Rank))))
```

```{r}
gdp <- data %>% mutate(GDP = as.integer(str_replace_all(str_replace_all(GDP, ",",""), pattern = " ", "")),Rank = as.integer(Rank))
```

```{r}
mean(gdp$GDP)
```

```{r}
dim(gdp)
```

```{r}
grep("^United", gdp$Country)
```

```{r}
fed <- read.csv("data/FEDSTATS_Country.csv")
```

```{r}
data <- gdp %>% inner_join(fed, join_by(CountryCode))
```

```{r}
data %>% arrange(GDP) %>% head(13)
```

```{r}
aggregate(Rank ~ Income.Group, data, mean)
```

```{r}
sum(grepl("Fiscal year end.*June", data$Special.Notes))
```

```{r}
library(stringr)
sum(str_detect(data$Special.Notes, regex("fiscal year end", ignore_case = TRUE)) &
      str_detect(data$Special.Notes, "June"), na.rm = TRUE)
```

```{r}

```
